source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage, Crane Wire Rope Guard Assembly

event.top_event: Crane wire rope guard assembly fell from height striking deck
actions_taken: PIC placed main load line out of service
Gulf Crane mechanic inspected crane and replaced rope guard
Gulf Crane mechanic placed auxiliary load line out of service due to high stranding damage
New auxiliary load line installed on June 26, 2022
GC engineer submitted engineering report recommending replacement of main load line idler sheave carrier with double-sheave idler
event.summary: On June 24, 2022, at approximately 12:30 pm during completion operations at VR-369 platform A, the wire rope guard assembly for the main load line idler sheave carrier fell 103 feet to the platform deck. The incident occurred when the auxiliary load line jumped over the main load line idler sheave carrier plate and came to rest on the wire rope guard, causing abrasion damage. The root cause was identified as flawed equipment design of the American Aero OM 450 platform crane, where the auxiliary load line and boom line run in close proximity to the main load line idler sheave carrier, allowing contact during high-speed operation.
recommendations: BSEE Lake Charles District recommends issuing a Safety Alert regarding the incident
Replace main load line idler sheave carrier with a double-sheave idler to allow independent operation of main and auxiliary load lines

threats.name: Auxiliary load line contact with main load line idler sheave carrier
Wire rope guard assembly degradation from abrasion
Inadequate pre-use and annual inspection detection

consequences.name: Dropped wire rope guard assembly striking personnel or equipment on deck
Loss of auxiliary load line integrity and operational capability
Potential personnel injury from falling object

controls.name: Crane pre-use inspection form
controls.barrier_role: Detection of equipment defects prior to operation
controls.lod_basis: Preventive inspection before crane operations commence

supporting_text: At 6:20 am the FC operator completed the platform crane pre-use inspection form
Investigators reviewed the pre-use form for the month of June 2022, and no deficiencies were noted for the auxiliary load line or the main load line idler sheave carrier

controls.name: Annual crane inspection reports
controls.barrier_role: Detection of recurring equipment issues and design flaws
controls.lod_basis: Periodic inspection to identify systemic equipment problems

supporting_text: Investigators reviewed the annual inspection reports for the crane from 2017 through 2022. There was no mention in the reports of the auxiliary load line or the boom line running in close proximity to the main load line idler sheave carrier
Furthermore, there was no documentation of the auxiliary load line or the boom lines contacting the main load line idler sheave carrier

controls.name: Daily safety meeting and job hazard review
controls.barrier_role: Communication of hazards and safe work procedures
controls.lod_basis: Pre-work hazard identification and mitigation planning

supporting_text: At 6:00 am, the Person in Charge (PIC) held the daily safety meeting to review the job task and potential hazards

controls.name: Crane equipment design specification
controls.barrier_role: Engineering design to prevent line contact and abrasion
controls.lod_basis: Inherent design to prevent auxiliary and main load lines from contacting idler sheave carrier

supporting_text: Flawed equipment design: The auxiliary load line and boom line run in close proximity to the main load line idler sheave carrier
The GC engineer informed the investigators this is an issue with the American Aero OM 450 platform crane, and they are correcting this issue as it is identified

controls.name: Immediate response and line isolation
controls.barrier_role: Containment and prevention of further damage or personnel injury
controls.lod_basis: Rapid response to remove failed equipment from service

supporting_text: The PIC placed the main load line out of service
The mechanic found the auxiliary load line with high stranding damage from abrading on the rope guard and placed the auxiliary load line out of service

controls.name: Equipment replacement and repair
controls.barrier_role: Restoration of equipment integrity and operational safety
controls.lod_basis: Replacement of damaged components and installation of improved design

supporting_text: Renaissance flew a Gulf Crane (GC) mechanic to VR-369 to inspect the crane and the missing rope guard, the mechanic replaced the rope guard and placed the main load line back in service
On June 26, 2022, the GC mechanic installed a new auxiliary load line

controls.name: Engineering assessment and design improvement
controls.lod_basis: Corrective action to eliminate root cause through double-sheave idler installation

supporting_text: GC recommended that the main load line idler sheave carrier be replaced with a double-sheave idler. The new double idler sheave carrier allows the main load line and the auxiliary load line to run independently and avert abrading on the new idler sheave carrier

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
